channel.title: Sawdust Standard
channel.description: Fresh takes for hobby woodworkers in small shops.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/BeginnerWoodWorking is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the shop setup community this week.

item.title: The finishing checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified finishing purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of joinery
item.description: The most common early stumbles in joinery, and the cheap corrections that fix them for hobby woodworkers in small shops.

item.title: "first hand tool set" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about first hand tool set through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your shop setup questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the shop setup questions hobby woodworkers in small shops keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in finishing with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest finishing adjustments that hobby woodworkers in small shops report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: first hand tool set
item.description: The persistent myths around first hand tool set, stress-tested against what hobby woodworkers in small shops actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your hand tools in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying hand tools project for hobby woodworkers in small shops — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/handtools is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the shop setup community this week.
